## 1. Executive Summary

The **Registration** module is a Dropwizard-based Java microservice within the Mercury Services platform. It manages the full lifecycle of company registrations for new participants on the INTTRA network — from initial form submission through compliance screening (OFAC/RPS check), company provisioning, user account creation, and final approval or rejection.

### Core Responsibilities

| Responsibility | Description |
|---|---|
| **Registration Intake** | Accept new company registration submissions via REST API, validate inputs (SCAC, company fields), persist to DynamoDB |
| **Async Post-Submit Processing** | After initial save, asynchronously send the Welcome email, generate an InttraCompanyId, and run the OFAC compliance check |
| **Admin Workflow** | Provide a rich admin REST API for agents to assign, review, approve, decline, hold, and update registrations |
| **Compliance Screening** | Invoke the `np-compliance-screening` network service (OFAC/RPS check) on company name, address, and contact data |
| **Company Provisioning** | On approval, create the company record via the `company` network service, add the email domain to a whitelist, and create the primary user account (when E2 Proxy is disabled) |
| **Email Notifications** | Send transactional emails (Welcome, On Hold, Approved, Declined variants) via AWS SES using Handlebars templates |
| **Audit Trail** | Maintain a timestamped `activityMessageLogs` list and `Audit` object on every record, updated on every state transition |

---

## 2. Technology Stack

| Layer / Concern | Library / Framework | Exact Version |
|---|---|---|
| **Runtime Language** | Java | 17 (LTS) |
| **Web Framework** | Dropwizard | Inherited from `mercury-services` parent POM (commons `1.0.17-SNAPSHOT`) |
| **Dependency Injection** | Google Guice (via `InttraServer` / `AbstractModule`) | Inherited from commons |
| **REST API** | Jakarta JAX-RS (Jersey) | Jakarta namespace (EE 10) |
| **ORM / DynamoDB Client** | AWS SDK v2 Enhanced DynamoDB Client | Inherited via `commons 1.0.17-SNAPSHOT` |
| **DynamoDB Abstraction** | Internal `cloudsdk` `DatabaseRepository` / `EnhancedDynamoRepository` | `commons 1.0.17-SNAPSHOT` |
| **Email Client** | Internal `cloudsdk` `EmailService` / `EmailClientFactory` (SES) | `commons 1.0.17-SNAPSHOT` |
| **JSON Serialization** | Jackson Databind | Inherited from Dropwizard |
| **CSV Support** | `jackson-dataformat-csv` | `2.13.4` |
| **Logging** | SLF4J + Logback (Dropwizard default) | Inherited |
| **Metrics** | Dropwizard Metrics + Observability Reporter | Inherited |
| **Lombok** | Lombok | Inherited (`${lombok.version}`) |
| **Validation** | Jakarta Validation / Hibernate Validator | Inherited |
| **Build Packaging** | Maven Shade Plugin (uber-jar) | `3.5.1` |
| **Maven Compiler** | maven-compiler-plugin | `3.12.1` |
| **Maven Surefire** | maven-surefire-plugin | `3.1.2` |
| **Maven Failsafe** | maven-failsafe-plugin | `3.1.2` |
| **Maven Dependency** | maven-dependency-plugin | `3.6.1` |
| **Unit Testing** | JUnit 5 Jupiter | `5.12.2` (via BOM) |
| **Legacy Tests** | JUnit 4 (Vintage Engine) | `4.13.2` |
| **Mocking** | Mockito Core + JUnit Jupiter extension | `5.17.0` |
| **Assertions** | AssertJ | `3.27.2` |
| **Diff utility (tests)** | diff-match-patch | `1.2` |
| **Integration Test DynamoDB** | `dynamo-integration-test` (DynamoDB Local) | `commons 1.0.17-SNAPSHOT` |
| **AWS SDK Core (test scope)** | `aws-java-sdk-core` | `1.12.484` |
| **Commons IO (test scope)** | `commons-io` | `2.19.0` |
| **XSS Protection** | `XSSInterceptor` / `XSSFilter` (mercury commons) | `commons 1.0.17-SNAPSHOT` |

## 3. System Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                          EXTERNAL ACTORS                                        │
│                                                                                 │
│    ┌──────────────────┐          ┌──────────────────┐                           │
│    │  Registration    │          │  INTTRA Admin    │                           │
│    │  Applicant       │          │  Agents          │                           │
│    │  (unauthenticated│          │  (REGISTRATION_  │                           │
│    │   or authed)     │          │   ADMIN role)    │                           │
│    └────────┬─────────┘          └────────┬─────────┘                           │
└────────────-│───────────────────────────-─│────────────────────────────────────-┘
             │  HTTPS                       │  HTTPS
             ▼                             ▼
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    REGISTRATION MICROSERVICE (Dropwizard / JVM)               │
│                                                                               │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  REST Layer  (port 8080, rootPath: /registration)                       │  │
│  │                                                                         │  │
│  │  RegistrationResource  (JAX-RS @Singleton)                              │  │
│  │  ┌──────────┬───────────┬───────────┬──────────────┬───────────────┐   │  │
│  │  │ POST     │ POST      │ GET       │ GET           │ POST          │   │  │
│  │  │/register │/assign    │/{id}      │/fetch/{type}  │/process/*     │   │  │
│  │  │ (open)   │(ADMIN)    │(ADMIN)    │(ADMIN)        │(ADMIN)        │   │  │
│  │  └────┬─────┴─────┬─────┴─────┬─────┴──────┬────────┴──────┬────────┘   │  │
│  │       │           │           │            │               │             │  │
│  │  XSS Interceptor (POST/PUT body) + XSS Filter (headers/query params)    │  │
│  │  OAuth Token Validation (InttraPrincipal extraction)                    │  │
│  └───────┬───────────┬───────────┬────────────┬───────────────┬─────────────┘  │
│          │           │           │            │               │                 │
│          ▼           ▼           ▼            ▼               ▼                 │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  Service Layer                                                           │  │
│  │                                                                          │  │
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────┐  ┌───────────────────────────────┐  │  │
│  │  │    RegistrationService          │  │   RegistrationDetailService   │  │  │
│  │  │  - register()                   │  │  - save() / update()          │  │  │
│  │  │  - approve()                   │  │  - validateAndGet()            │  │  │
│  │  │  - declineRegistration()        │  │  - supplementAndUpdate()      │  │  │
│  │  │  - holdRegistration()           │  │  - validateAndOverride()      │  │  │
│  │  │  - update()                     │  │  - getIndexed()               │  │  │
│  │  │  - doComplianceCheck()          │  │  - export() / findAll()       │  │  │
│  │  │  - assignUser()                 │  └────────────┬──────────────────┘  │  │
│  │  │  - assignInttraCompanyId()      │               │                     │  │
│  │  │  - sendEmail()  [private]       │               │                     │  │
│  │  │  - process()    [async]         │               ▼                     │  │
│  │  │                                 │  ┌───────────────────────────────┐  │  │
│  │  │  ┌─────────────────────────┐   │  │       EmailSender             │  │  │
│  │  │  │  ExecutorService         │   │  │  - sendEmail()                │  │  │
│  │  │  │  @Named("processor")     │   │  │  - buildEmailVariables()      │  │  │
│  │  │  │  (ThreadPoolExecutor:    │   │  └───────────────────────────────┘  │  │
│  │  │  │   min=15 max=30          │   │                                     │  │
│  │  │  │   queue=75)              │   │                                     │  │
│  │  │  └─────────────────────────┘   │                                     │  │
│  │  └────────────────────────────────┘                                     │  │
│  └──────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────-┘  │
│             │                                                                  │
│    ┌────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐       │
│    │  Network Service Clients  (Jersey HTTP via ServiceClient)         │       │
│    │                                                                    │       │
│    │  CompanyService           → /network/company                      │       │
│    │  CompanyComplianceService → /network/participant/compliance        │       │
│    │  UserService              → /network/user/create                  │       │
│    │  BlackListService         → /network/blacklist-email/find          │       │
│    │  DomainWhitelistService   → /network/participant/domainwhitelist   │       │
│    │  NetworkParticipantService→ /network/reference/participants        │       │
│    │  UIConfigurationService   → /network/ui-configuration             │       │
│    └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘       │
│                                                                                │
│    ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│    │  Persistence Layer                                                    │   │
│    │                                                                       │   │
│    │  RegistrationDao (cloudsdk DatabaseRepository<RegistrationDetail>)   │   │
│    │  - getRegistrationDetailByID()  (consistent read)                    │   │
│    │  - getIndexedRegistrationDetails()  (GSI query)                      │   │
│    │  - save() / update() / delete()                                      │   │
│    │  - findAll() / export()                                               │   │
│    └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
└───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                    │
            ┌───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────┐
            ▼                       ▼                              ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐   ┌──────────────────────┐      ┌───────────────────────┐
  │   AWS DynamoDB   │   │   Network Services   │      │   AWS SES             │
  │                  │   │   (INTTRA Platform)  │      │   (via EmailService)  │
  │  {env}_          │   │                      │      │                       │
  │  RegistrationD   │   │  company             │      │  6 Email Templates    │
  │  etail           │   │  user                │      │  (Handlebars/JSON)    │
  │                  │   │  compliance          │      │                       │
  │  GSI:            │   │  blacklist           │      │  WelcomeEmail         │
  │  REGISTRATION_   │   │  domainwhitelist     │      │  OnHoldEmail          │
  │  STATUS_         │   │  network-participants│      │  ApprovedEmail        │
  │  SUBMITTED_ON    │   │  ui-configuration    │      │  Declined_*Email      │
  │  _INDEX          │   │                      │      │                       │
  │                  │   │                      │      │                       │
  │  TTL: expiresOn  │   └──────────────────────┘      └───────────────────────┘
  │  Stream: KEYS_   │
  │  ONLY            │
  └──────────────────┘
```

## 4. Key Classes Reference

| Class | Package | Role / Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| `RegistrationApplication` | `com.inttra.mercury.registration` | Main entry point. Bootstraps the Dropwizard `InttraServer` with all Guice modules, the `DynamoDBCommand`, and the `RegistrationResource` |
| `RegistrationResource` | `...resources` | JAX-RS REST endpoint class. Maps all HTTP routes, extracts `InttraPrincipal` from `SecurityContext`, delegates to `RegistrationService` |
| `RegistrationService` | `...services` | Primary orchestration service. Contains all business logic: registration submission, approval pipeline, decline, hold, OFAC check delegation, email dispatch, SCAC validation |
| `RegistrationDetailService` | `...services` | DynamoDB interaction service. Handles optimistic locking (version checking), audit supplementation, `validateAndGet`, `supplementAndUpdate`, `validateAndOverride`, and `save`/`update` lifecycle |
| `RegistrationDao` | `...persistence` | Data access object. Wraps the `cloudsdk` `DatabaseRepository`. Encapsulates DynamoDB query specs (GSI queries, consistent reads, batch fetch, scan/export) |
| `RegistrationDetail` | `...model` | DynamoDB entity and REST API DTO. Annotated with `@DynamoDbBean`, `@DynamoDbPartitionKey`, `@DynamoDbVersionAttribute`, GSI annotations, TTL, and custom type converters |
| `RegistrationStatus` | `...model` | Enum of all lifecycle states (15 values). Each has an `isTerminal()` flag |
| `CompanyRole` | `...model` | Enum of 8 allowed company roles (Shipper, Freight_Forwarder, Carrier_VO, Carrier_NVO, etc.) |
| `EmailType` | `...model` | Enum of 6 email types (WLC, ONH, DNR, DDA, DUA, APR) with template names and log format strings |
| `RegistrationFetchType` | `...model` | Enum for list fetch strategies: ALL, OPEN, ASSIGNED, UNASSIGNED, TERMINAL |
| `Audit` | `...model` | DynamoDB-embedded bean tracking `createdById`, `createdBy`, `createdDateUtc`, `lastModifiedById`, `lastModifiedBy`, `lastModifiedDateUtc` |
| `MessageLog` | `...model` | DynamoDB-embedded bean representing one entry in the `activityMessageLogs` list. Fields: `version`, `message`, `loggedById`, `loggedByName`, `loggedOn` |
| `AssignUserRequest` | `...model` | Request body for `POST /assign`. Contains `registrationId`, `versionNumber`, `assignToUserId`, `assignToUserName` |
| `Constants` | `...model` | String constants for log messages, GSI name (`REGISTRATION_STATUS_SUBMITTED_ON_INDEX`), and `DYNAMODB_MAX_NUMBER_OF_DAYS_OLDER_THAN = 60` |
| `EmailSender` | `...services` | Wraps the `cloudsdk` `EmailService`. Builds a template variable map and invokes `sendTemplateEmail`. Throws `SendEmailException` on failure |
| `EmailContants` | `...services` | String constant keys for email template variable substitution |
| `Utils` | `...services` | Reflection utility. Reads `@Projections` annotations on `RegistrationDetail` fields to build DynamoDB projection expression strings |
| `CompanyService` | `...networkservices.company` | HTTP client for the `company` network service. Calls `generateInttraCompanyId` and `createCompany` |
| `CompanyComplianceService` | `...networkservices.company` | HTTP client for `np-compliance-screening`. Calls `doCompanyCompliance(NPComplianceRequest)` |
| `UserService` | `...networkservices.user` | HTTP client for `user` network service. Calls `createUser(User)` |
| `BlackListService` | `...networkservices.blacklist` | HTTP client for `blacklist-email/find`. Checks if business email is blacklisted |
| `DomainWhitelistService` | `...networkservices.domainwhitelist` | HTTP client for `participant/domainwhitelist`. Adds the email domain of a newly created company |
| `NetworkParticipantService` | `...networkservices.networkparticipant` | HTTP client for `reference/participants`. Checks SCAC code uniqueness |
| `UIConfigurationService` | `...networkservices.uiconfiguration` | HTTP client for `ui-configuration`. Fetches `carrierConnectionsV2Enabled` and `e2ProxyEnabled` flags |
| `NPComplianceRequest` | `...networkservices.company.model` | Request DTO for the compliance screening service: `inttraCompanyId`, `companyName`, `Address`, `Contacts` |
| `NPComplianceResponse` | `...networkservices.company.model` | Response DTO from compliance screening: `inttraCompanyId`, `rpsStatus` (PASS/HOLD), `error` |
| `RpsStatus` | `...networkservices.company.model` | Enum: `PASS` or `HOLD` (from the compliance service) |
| `CompanyCreationRequest` | `...networkservices.company.model` | Request DTO sent to the `company` service for provisioning: full company and contact details |
| `RegistrationConfig` | `...config` | Root Dropwizard configuration POJO. Aggregates `RegistrationDynamoConfig`, `RegistrationEmailConfig`, `EnvironmentConfig` |
| `RegistrationDynamoConfig` | `...config` | DynamoDB connection parameters: `environment` (table prefix), `readCapacityUnits`, `writeCapacityUnits`, `region`, `endpointOverride` |
| `RegistrationEmailConfig` | `...config` | Email sender config: `sourceEmail`, `internalEmails` |
| `EnvironmentConfig` | `...config` | Portal URLs injected into email templates: `shipmentPortalURL`, `myAdminPortalURL`, `myAdminHarmonizedPortalURL` |
| `AuditConverter` | `...config` | (Converter/adapter for audit fields if needed — config package) |
| `ApplicationModule` | `...common` | Guice module. Binds the `ExecutorService` thread pool (`processor`, min=15, max=30, queue=75), XSS interceptors, and `RegistrationEmailConfig` |
| `RegistrationDynamoModule` | `...common` | Guice module. Provides `DynamoDbClientConfig`, `EnhancedDynamoRepository`, `DatabaseRepository`, and `RegistrationDao` via `@Provides @Singleton` methods |
| `RegistrationEmailSenderModule` | `...common` | Guice module. Provides `EmailService` singleton via `EmailClientFactory.createDefaultSesClient(templateList)` |
| `ServiceDefinitionModule` | `...common` | Guice module. Binds each `ServiceDefinition` (from YAML) as a named binding, enabling `@Named("company")` injection in network service clients |
| `DynamoDBCommand` | `...dynamodb` | Dropwizard CLI command (`dynamo-create`). Creates the DynamoDB table, GSI, TTL, and DynamoDB Streams if they do not already exist |

---

## 5. Registration State Machine

The registration lifecycle is captured by the `RegistrationStatus` enum. Two states are marked **terminal** (`isTerminal() = true`): `COMPLETED` and `DECLINED`. All others are non-terminal (eligible for further transitions).

```
                           ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
                           │              REGISTRATION LIFECYCLE              │
                           └─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  [Client submits POST /register]
            │
            ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐
  │    SUBMITTED     │  ← Initial state set by register().
  │  (non-terminal)  │    UUID assigned. Audit created. ExpiresOn = now + 400 days.
  │                  │    Saved to DynamoDB.
  └────────┬─────────┘
           │  (async: ExecutorService submits processRegistration())
           │  Step 1: sendEmail(WLC)
           ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐         [Email send error]
  │  SUBMITTED       │  ←──────────────────────── error logged in activityMessageLog
  │  (still)         │                             state does NOT change on email failure
  └────────┬─────────┘
           │  Step 2: assignInttraCompanyId()
           │          Calls companyService.generateInttraCompanyId()
           ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐
  │    SUBMITTED     │  ← inttraCompanyId populated; status still SUBMITTED
  │  (still, +id)    │    (no intermediate INTTRA_ID_ASSIGNED status in enum)
  └────────┬─────────┘
           │  Step 3: doComplianceCheck()
           │          Calls np-compliance-screening with companyName, address, contacts
           │
           ├──────────[RpsStatus.PASS]───────────────────────────────────────┐
           │                                                                  │
           ▼                                                                  ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐                                              ┌──────────────────┐
  │  PENDING_OFAC    │  ← Set when compliance API throws exception  │   OFAC_PASSED    │
  │  (non-terminal)  │    (network error, timeout, etc.)            │  (non-terminal)  │
  └────────┬─────────┘                                              └────────┬─────────┘
           │                                                                  │
           │  [Admin manually retries: POST /process/docompliance]            │
           │──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
           │
           │          [RpsStatus.HOLD]
           ├──────────────────────────────┐
           │                              ▼
           │                    ┌──────────────────┐
           │                    │   OFAC_FAILED    │
           │                    │  (non-terminal)  │
           │                    │                  │
           │                    │ Admin can still  │
           │                    │ decline or hold  │
           │                    └────────┬─────────┘
           │                             │
           │                 [Admin: POST /process/decline/{emailType}]
           │                             │
           ▼                             ▼
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │               ADMIN WORKFLOW  (all require REGISTRATION_ADMIN role)  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  From OFAC_PASSED (or any non-terminal state):

  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Admin Actions Available on Non-Terminal States        │
  │                                                        │
  │  1. POST /process/onhold          → ON_HOLD + ONH email│
  │  2. POST /process/decline/{type}  → DECLINED + email   │
  │  3. POST /process/approve         → Approval pipeline  │
  │  4. POST /process/update          → data edit (→UPDATED│
  │     + optional OFAC re-trigger)                        │
  │  5. POST /assign                  → assign admin user  │
  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  ┌──────────────────┐
  │    ON_HOLD       │  ← holdRegistration(): status set + ONH email sent
  │  (non-terminal)  │
  └────────┬─────────┘
           │  [Admin: POST /process/docompliance OR /process/approve]
           │  (re-enters normal flow)
           ▼

  ══════════════════════════  APPROVAL PIPELINE  ══════════════════════════

  Precondition: registration must be in OFAC_PASSED state.
  Admin must be the assigned user (AssigneeMismatchException if not).

  [1] Check email blacklist (BlackListService)
         │
         ├── [Blacklisted] → EMAIL_BLACKLISTED (non-terminal) + BadRequestException thrown
         │
         ▼ [Not blacklisted]
  [2] Create Company (CompanyService.createCompany)
         │ → status: COMPANY_CREATED
         │
         ▼
  [3] Add Domain Whitelist (DomainWhitelistService.addCompanyDomainWhitelist)
         │ → status: DOMAIN_WHITELISTED
         │
         ├── [Failure] → status: DOMAIN_WHITELIST_FAILED (continues, non-fatal)
         │
         ▼
  [4] Create User (UserService.createUser) — ONLY if e2ProxyEnabled = false
         │ → status: USER_CREATED
         │
         ├── [Failure] → status: USER_CREATION_FAILED (continues, non-fatal)
         │
         ▼
  [5] Send APR (Approval) Email
         │
         ▼
  ┌──────────────────┐
  │    COMPLETED     │  ← TERMINAL. Company fully provisioned.
  │   (TERMINAL)     │
  └──────────────────┘

  ══════════════════════════  DECLINE PATHS  ══════════════════════════

  Admin calls POST /process/decline/{emailType}  where emailType ∈ {DNR, DDA, DUA}

  [1] status set to: DECLINED
  [2] Decline email sent (DNR, DDA, or DUA template)

  ┌──────────────────┐
  │    DECLINED      │  ← TERMINAL. Registration rejected.
  │   (TERMINAL)     │
  └──────────────────┘

  ══════════════════════  ALL STATES SUMMARY  ══════════════════════════

  State                  Terminal?   Description
  ─────────────────────  ─────────   ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  SUBMITTED              No          Initial state after POST /register
  PENDING_OFAC           No          OFAC check attempted but failed (exception)
  OFAC_PASSED            No          OFAC/RPS returned PASS — eligible for approval
  OFAC_FAILED            No          OFAC/RPS returned HOLD — further review needed
  ON_HOLD                No          Admin placed on hold; ONH email sent
  COMPANY_CREATED        No          Intermediate: company record created
  DOMAIN_WHITELISTED     No          Intermediate: email domain whitelisted
  DOMAIN_WHITELIST_FAILED No         Non-fatal: domain whitelist API failed
  USER_CREATED           No          Intermediate: user account created
  USER_CREATION_FAILED   No          Non-fatal: user creation failed
  UPDATED                No          Registration data was admin-edited
  EMAIL_BLACKLISTED      No          Business email is on the blacklist
  FAILED                 No          Catch-all failure during approval pipeline
  COMPLETED              YES         Fully approved and provisioned
  DECLINED               YES         Rejected; one of three decline emails sent
```

---

## 6. Data Flows

### 6.1 Submit Registration (POST /register)

```
Client                    RegistrationResource          RegistrationService
  │                              │                              │
  │─── POST /registration/register ──────────────────────────► │
  │    Body: RegistrationDetail                                 │
  │    (JWT in Authorization header)                            │
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │─ register(principal, dto) ──►│
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │                 [1] normalizeAndValidateScacCode()
  │                              │                     ├─ trim SCAC
  │                              │                     ├─ check spaces → 400 if found
  │                              │                     ├─ check length ≤ 35 → 400 if exceeded
  │                              │                     ├─ check alphanumeric → 400 if not
  │                              │                     ├─ toUpperCase()
  │                              │                     └─ NetworkParticipantService.checkIfScacCodeExists()
  │                              │                              │  GET /network/reference/participants?scacCode=X
  │                              │                              │  → 400 if SCAC taken
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │                 [2] Validate SCAC only for Carrier_VO / Carrier_NVO
  │                              │                     → 400 if non-carrier role has SCAC
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │                 [3] Set fields:
  │                              │                     - registrationStatus = SUBMITTED
  │                              │                     - audit = new Audit(loggedInUser)
  │                              │                     - expiresOn = createdDateUtc + 400 days
  │                              │                     - activityMessageLogs.add("Registration Submitted")
  │                              │                     - submittedOn = OffsetDateTime.now(UTC)
  │                              │                     - registrationId = UUID.randomUUID()
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │            RegistrationDetailService.save()
  │                              │                     │
  │                              │                     ├─► RegistrationDao.save()
  │                              │                     │       → DynamoDB PutItem
  │                              │                     │         (version auto-set to 0 by Enhanced Client)
  │                              │                     │
  │                              │                     └─► RegistrationDao.getRegistrationDetailByID()
  │                              │                             → consistent read to fetch version
  │                              │                              │
  │◄─── 200 OK: RegistrationDetail (with version) ─────────────┤
  │                                                             │
  │                              ╔════════════════════════════╗ │
  │                              ║  ASYNC: process()          ║ │
  │                              ║  (ExecutorService submit)  ║ │
  │                              ╠════════════════════════════╣ │
  │                              ║                            ║ │
  │                              ║ [A] sendEmail(WLC)         ║ │
  │                              ║     EmailSender             ║ │
  │                              ║     → EmailService          ║ │
  │                              ║       .sendTemplateEmail(  ║ │
  │                              ║         "WelcomeEmail",    ║ │
  │                              ║         [businessEmail],   ║ │
  │                              ║         vars{companyName,  ║ │
  │                              ║           preferredLang,   ║ │
  │                              ║           sourceEmail,     ║ │
  │                              ║           userFullName,    ║ │
  │                              ║           streetAddress,   ║ │
  │                              ║           cityName,        ║ │
  │                              ║           countryName,     ║ │
  │                              ║           phoneNumber,     ║ │
  │                              ║           inttraCompanyId, ║ │
  │                              ║           carrierConnV2,   ║ │
  │                              ║           shipmentPortalURL║ │
  │                              ║           myAdminURL,      ║ │
  │                              ║           myAdminHarmURL}) ║ │
  │                              ║     → AWS SES              ║ │
  │                              ║     → DynamoDB update      ║ │
  │                              ║       (log message appended)║ │
  │                              ║                            ║ │
  │                              ║ [B] assignInttraCompanyId()║ │
  │                              ║     CompanyService.        ║ │
  │                              ║       generateInttraCompanyId()
  │                              ║     GET /network/company/  ║ │
  │                              ║       generateinttracompanyId
  │                              ║     → inttraCompanyId saved ║ │
  │                              ║       to DynamoDB          ║ │
  │                              ║                            ║ │
  │                              ║ [C] doComplianceCheck()    ║ │
  │                              ║     CompanyCompliance      ║ │
  │                              ║       Service.             ║ │
  │                              ║       doCompanyCompliance()║ │
  │                              ║     POST /network/         ║ │
  │                              ║       participant/         ║ │
  │                              ║       compliance           ║ │
  │                              ║     {inttraCompanyId,      ║ │
  │                              ║      companyName,          ║ │
  │                              ║      address, contacts}    ║ │
  │                              ║                            ║ │
  │                              ║     if RpsStatus=PASS:     ║ │
  │                              ║       status→OFAC_PASSED   ║ │
  │                              ║     if RpsStatus=HOLD:     ║ │
  │                              ║       status→OFAC_FAILED   ║ │
  │                              ║     if exception:          ║ │
  │                              ║       status→PENDING_OFAC  ║ │
  │                              ║     → DynamoDB update      ║ │
  │                              ╚════════════════════════════╝ │
```

### 6.2 Approve Registration (POST /process/approve)

```
Admin                     RegistrationResource          RegistrationService
  │                              │                              │
  │─── POST /registration/process/approve?registrationId=X&versionNumber=N ──►│
  │    Requires: REGISTRATION_ADMIN role                        │
  │    Requires: principal.id == registration.assignedToUserId  │
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │─ approve(principal, id, ver)►│
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [1] validateAndGet(id, ver, assigneeId)
  │                              │               ├─ fetch from DynamoDB (consistent read)
  │                              │               ├─ version check → VersionMismatchException
  │                              │               └─ assignee check → AssigneeMismatchException
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [2] Guard: status MUST be OFAC_PASSED
  │                              │               → IllegalStateException if not
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [3] BlackListService.isEmailBlackListed(email)
  │                              │               POST /network/blacklist-email/find
  │                              │               ├─ 200 + body → check emailAddress list
  │                              │               ├─ 404       → not blacklisted (false)
  │                              │               └─ other     → RuntimeException
  │                              │               if blacklisted:
  │                              │                 status→EMAIL_BLACKLISTED
  │                              │                 → DynamoDB update
  │                              │                 → throw BadRequestException
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [4] CompanyService.createCompany()
  │                              │               Build CompanyCreationRequest:
  │                              │                 {registrationId, companyName,
  │                              │                  inttraCompanyId, companyRole,
  │                              │                  governmentId/taxId,
  │                              │                  scacCode (carriers only),
  │                              │                  address fields, contact fields,
  │                              │                  preferredLanguage (2-char for zh-CN/TW)}
  │                              │               POST /network/company/create
  │                              │               → 204 expected; else throw exception
  │                              │               status→COMPANY_CREATED
  │                              │               approvedOn = now(UTC)
  │                              │               → DynamoDB update
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [5] DomainWhitelistService.addCompanyDomainWhitelist()
  │                              │               Extract domain from businessEmail (@domain.com)
  │                              │               POST /network/participant/domainwhitelist
  │                              │               {inttraCompanyId, domain}
  │                              │               ├─ 200 → status→DOMAIN_WHITELISTED
  │                              │               └─ error → status→DOMAIN_WHITELIST_FAILED (non-fatal)
  │                              │               → DynamoDB update
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [6] UIConfigurationService.getE2ProxyFlagEnabled()
  │                              │               GET /network/ui-configuration?name=e2ProxyEnabled
  │                              │               if e2ProxyEnabled = false:
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [7] UserService.createUser()
  │                              │               Build User request:
  │                              │                 {firstName, surName, companyId(inttraCompanyId),
  │                              │                  loginName=email, emailAddress,
  │                              │                  primaryPhone, taxId,
  │                              │                  roles={NETWORK_USER, COMPANY_USER_ADMIN,
  │                              │                         OCEANSCHEDULE_USER, BOOKING_ADMIN,
  │                              │                         BOOKING_RAC},
  │                              │                  legacyRoles={3003, 3009, 3021, 3022, 3023,
  │                              │                               3024, 3020, 800020, 3004},
  │                              │                  preferredLanguage (mapped)}
  │                              │               POST /network/user/create
  │                              │               ├─ 200 → status→USER_CREATED
  │                              │               └─ error → status→USER_CREATION_FAILED (non-fatal)
  │                              │               → DynamoDB update
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [8] sendEmail(APR)
  │                              │               EmailSender.sendEmail(registration, APR)
  │                              │               Template: "ApprovedEmail"
  │                              │               → AWS SES
  │                              │               → DynamoDB update (log appended)
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │           [9] status→COMPLETED
  │                              │               logMessage = "Company Approval Completed"
  │                              │               → DynamoDB update (FINAL)
  │                              │                              │
  │◄─── 200 OK: RegistrationDetail (COMPLETED) ────────────────┘
```

### 6.3 Decline Registration (POST /process/decline/{emailType})

```
Admin                     RegistrationResource          RegistrationService
  │                              │                              │
  │─── POST /registration/process/decline/{emailType} ─────────►│
  │    ?registrationId=X&versionNumber=N                        │
  │    emailType ∈ {DNR, DDA, DUA}                              │
  │    Requires: REGISTRATION_ADMIN role                        │
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │─ declineRegistration() ─────►│
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │     [1] Validate emailType ∈ declinedEmailTypeList
  │                              │         → IllegalArgumentException if not
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │     [2] validateAndUpdate():
  │                              │         ├─ fetch from DynamoDB
  │                              │         ├─ version check (VersionMismatchException)
  │                              │         ├─ assignee check (AssigneeMismatchException)
  │                              │         └─ supplement audit + message log
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │     [3] status → DECLINED
  │                              │         logMessage = "Registration Declined"
  │                              │         → DynamoDB update
  │                              │                              │
  │                              │     [4] sendEmail(emailType):
  │                              │         DNR → "DeclinedNoReponseEmail" template
  │                              │         DDA → "DeclinedDuplicateAccountEmail" template
  │                              │         DUA → "DeclinedUserAddedToExistingAccountEmail" template
  │                              │         → AWS SES
  │                              │         → DynamoDB update (log)
  │                              │                              │
  │◄─── 200 OK: RegistrationDetail (DECLINED) ─────────────────┘
```

---

## 7. DynamoDB Table Schema

### Table Definition

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| **Table Name** | `{environment}_RegistrationDetail` |
| **Name Examples** | `inttra_int_registration_RegistrationDetail`, `inttra2_prod_registration_RegistrationDetail` |
| **Partition Key** | `registrationId` (String, UUID) |
| **Sort Key** | None (single-key table) |
| **Billing Mode** | PROVISIONED (configured via `readCapacityUnits` / `writeCapacityUnits`) |
| **TTL Attribute** | `expiresOn` (Number — stored as epoch seconds via `DateEpochSecondAttributeConverter`) |
| **TTL Policy** | 400 days from `createdDateUtc` |
| **DynamoDB Streams** | Enabled — `StreamViewType.KEYS_ONLY` |
| **Optimistic Locking** | `version` attribute — managed by `@DynamoDbVersionAttribute`; starts at 0, auto-incremented on every `update()` call by the Enhanced Client |
| **Read Consistency** | Consistent reads for `getRegistrationDetailByID()`; eventual consistency for GSI queries |

### Global Secondary Index

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| **Index Name** | `REGISTRATION_STATUS_SUBMITTED_ON_INDEX` |
| **GSI Partition Key** | `registrationStatus` (String — enum name) |
| **GSI Sort Key** | `submittedOn` (String — ISO 8601 OffsetDateTime via `OffsetDateTimeTypeConverter`) |
| **Projection Type** | `INCLUDE` (non-key attributes: `assignedToUserId`) |
| **Use Case** | Fetch all registrations of a given status within the last N days (N = 60 by default). Used by all `fetchRegistrations` paths |

### Full Attribute Schema

| Attribute | DynamoDB Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `registrationId` | S | Partition key. UUID. `@DynamoDbPartitionKey` |
| `version` | N | Optimistic lock counter. `@DynamoDbVersionAttribute`. Starts at 0 |
| `companyName` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `companyRole` | S | Enum name (e.g., `Shipper`, `Carrier_VO`) |
| `scacCode` | S | Nullable. Only for Carrier_NVO / Carrier_VO. `NullifyEmptyStringConverter` applied |
| `streetAddress` | S | `@NotBlank`, `@Size(max=40)` |
| `streetAddress2` | S | Nullable, `@Size(max=40)` |
| `countryCode` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `countryName` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `subdivisionName` | S | Province / state |
| `cityCode` | S | City reference code |
| `cityName` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `postalCode` | S | Nullable |
| `taxId` | S | Government / tax ID |
| `firstName` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `lastName` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `businessEmail` | S | `@NotBlank`. Used as login name |
| `phoneNumber` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `preferredLanguage` | S | `@NotBlank`. BCP 47 code (e.g., `en`, `zh-CN`, `fr`) |
| `jobLevel` | S | `@NotBlank` |
| `jobFunction` | S | `@NotBlank`. Sent as `position` to company service |
| `termsOfServiceChecked` | BOOL | Must be accepted |
| `communicationConsentChecked` | BOOL | Optional marketing consent |
| `inttraCompanyId` | S | Populated asynchronously post-submit |
| `registrationStatus` | S | GSI partition key. Enum name |
| `submittedOn` | S | GSI sort key. ISO 8601 UTC string |
| `audit` | M (Map) | Nested `Audit` bean: `createdById`, `createdBy`, `createdDateUtc`, `lastModifiedById`, `lastModifiedBy`, `lastModifiedDateUtc` |
| `assignedToUserId` | S | GSI projected attribute. Admin user ID |
| `assignedToUser` | S | Admin user display name |
| `expiresOn` | N | TTL attribute. Epoch seconds. Computed as `createdDateUtc + 400 days` |
| `activityMessageLogs` | L (List) | List of `MessageLog` maps: `{version, message, loggedById, loggedByName, loggedOn}` |
| `logMessage` | S | Write-only (not serialized to JSON response). Staging field for the next log entry |
| `approvedOn` | S | ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Set during approval pipeline |

---

## 8. Email Design

All emails are sent via AWS SES using the `cloudsdk` `EmailService`. Templates are loaded from JSON files (Handlebars format) at startup via `RegistrationEmailSenderModule`. The `sendEmail()` method in `EmailSender` builds a shared variable map and calls `emailService.sendTemplateEmail(templateName, recipients, variables)`.

### Template Variable Map (common to all email types)

| Variable Key | Source |
|---|---|
| `companyName` | `registrationDetail.getCompanyName()` |
| `preferredLanguage` | `registrationDetail.getPreferredLanguage()` |
| `sourceEmail` | `registrationConfig.getEmailSenderConfig().getSourceEmail()` |
| `userFullName` | `registrationDetail.getFirstName() + " " + registrationDetail.getLastName()` |
| `streetAddress` | `streetAddress + ", " + streetAddress2` (null-safe join) |
| `cityName` | `registrationDetail.getCityName()` |
| `countryName` | `registrationDetail.getCountryName()` |
| `phoneNumber` | `registrationDetail.getPhoneNumber()` |
| `inttraCompanyId` | `registrationDetail.getInttraCompanyId()` |
| `carrierConnectionsV2Enabled` | `UIConfigurationService.getCarrierConnectionsV2Configuration()` → `"yes"` or `"no"` |
| `shipmentPortalURL` | `environmentConfig.getShipmentPortalURL()` |
| `myAdminPortalURL` | `environmentConfig.getMyAdminPortalURL()` |
| `myAdminHarmonizedPortalURL` | `environmentConfig.getMyAdminHarmonizedPortalURL()` |

### Email Types Reference

| Code | Template File | Template Name | Trigger Condition | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **WLC** | `WelcomeEmailTemplate.json` | `WelcomeEmail` | Immediately after `register()` succeeds (async, step 1 of `processRegistration`) | Acknowledges receipt of the registration. Sent to the registrant's business email |
| **ONH** | `OnHoldEmailTemplate.json` | `OnHoldEmail` | `holdRegistration()` or manual `sendEmail(ONH)` by admin | Informs the applicant that their registration is under review / on hold |
| **DNR** | `Declined_No_ResponseEmailTemplate.json` | `DeclinedNoReponseEmail` | `declineRegistration(..., DNR)` | Applicant did not respond or provide required information |
| **DDA** | `Declined_Duplicate_AccountEmailTemplate.json` | `DeclinedDuplicateAccountEmail` | `declineRegistration(..., DDA)` | A duplicate company account was found |
| **DUA** | `Declined_UserAddedEmailTemplate.json` | `DeclinedUserAddedToExistingAccountEmail` | `declineRegistration(..., DUA)` | User was added to an existing account instead |
| **APR** | `ApprovedEmailTemplate.json` | `ApprovedEmail` | Step 8 of `approve()` pipeline (after USER_CREATED / USER_CREATION_FAILED) | Company registration approved. Contains portal login URLs |

### Email Resend Behavior

All email types can be re-sent independently via `POST /process/sendemail/{emailType}` without changing the registration status. This is an admin-only operation. The registration's `activityMessageLogs` are updated with the email result (success or failure message) on each call.

### Email Failure Handling

If `emailService.sendTemplateEmail()` fails (returns a non-empty `failedEmailList`), a `SendEmailException` is thrown in `EmailSender`. `RegistrationService.sendEmail()` catches this and records the error in `activityMessageLogs` but does **not** halt the overall workflow — the state transition continues.

---

## 9. Default Roles Assignment on Approval

When a registration is approved and `e2ProxyEnabled = false`, `UserService.createUser()` is called with two sets of roles built in `RegistrationService.buildUserRequest()`.

### Mercury (Modern) Roles

These are string role names assigned to the user in the Mercury platform:

| Role Name | Description |
|---|---|
| `NETWORK_USER` | Access to network features |
| `COMPANY_USER_ADMIN` | Company-level user administration |
| `OCEANSCHEDULE_USER` | Ocean schedule viewing access |
| `BOOKING_ADMIN` | Booking administration |
| `BOOKING_RAC` | Booking Rate and Charges access |

### Legacy (Numeric) Roles

These are legacy role IDs from the INTTRA platform, passed in `legacyRoles`:

| Legacy ID | Legacy Role Name |
|---|---|
| `3003` | Customer Security Administrator |
| `3009` | Booking User |
| `3021` | Customer Web BL Approval User |
| `3023` | Customer Web BL Edit User |
| `3022` | Customer Web BL Share User |
| `3024` | Customer Web BL View User |
| `3020` | Reports User |
| `800020` | Shipping Instructions User |
| `3004` | Track and Trace User |

### Language Mapping

The `preferredLanguage` field from the registration (BCP 47 format from UI) is mapped to a locale string before being sent to the user service:

| Registration Language | User Service Locale |
|---|---|
| `en` | `en` |
| `es` | `es` |
| `pt` | `pt` |
| `tr` | `tr_TR` |
| `fr` | `fr_FR` |
| `zh-cn` | `zh_CN` |
| `zh-hk` | `zh_TW` |
| `jp` | `ja_JP` |

---

## 10. OFAC Compliance Integration

The OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control) / RPS (Restricted Party Screening) check is performed by delegating to the internal `np-compliance-screening` network service.

```
  RegistrationService.doComplianceCheck()
          │
          │ [Guard] If inttraCompanyId is null → call assignInttraCompanyId() first
          │
          ▼
  Build NPComplianceRequest:
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  inttraCompanyId  : registration.inttraCompanyId │
  │  companyName      : registration.companyName     │
  │  address:                                        │
  │    addressLine1   : streetAddress                │
  │    addressLine2   : streetAddress2               │
  │    cityName       : cityName                     │
  │    countryCode    : countryCode                  │
  │    postalCode     : postalCode                   │
  │  contacts:                                       │
  │    name           : firstName + " " + lastName   │
  │    emailAddresses : [businessEmail]              │
  │    phoneNumbers   : [phoneNumber]                │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
          │
          ▼
  CompanyComplianceService.doCompanyCompliance(request)
          │
          │  HTTP POST  https://api.inttra.com/network/participant/compliance
          │  (via internal ServiceClient)
          │
          ▼
  NPComplianceResponse:
    { inttraCompanyId, rpsStatus: PASS|HOLD, error }
          │
          ├── rpsStatus = PASS → registrationStatus = OFAC_PASSED
          │                       log: "Compliance check performed with status : PASS"
          │
          ├── rpsStatus = HOLD → registrationStatus = OFAC_FAILED
          │                       log: "Compliance check performed with status : HOLD"
          │
          └── exception / error ≠ null → registrationStatus = PENDING_OFAC
                                          log: "Error during compliance check: {message}"

  Note: PENDING_OFAC is explicitly for API/network failures — it signals
  "the check was not conclusive" rather than "check ran and failed".
  Admins can retry via POST /process/docompliance.

  Triggered automatically in the async processRegistration() flow.
  Can also be triggered manually by admin via:
    - POST /process/docompliance?registrationId=X&versionNumber=N
    - POST /process/update?triggerofac=true
```

---

## 11. SCAC Code Validation Rules

SCAC (Standard Carrier Alpha Code) validation is applied in both `register()` and `update()`. The validation is handled by `normalizeAndValidateScacCode()` in `RegistrationService`.

```
Input: registrationDetail.scacCode (may be null or empty)

  [Step 1] If null or empty → skip all validation (SCAC is optional)

  [Step 2] Trim leading/trailing whitespace

  [Step 3] Check for internal spaces
           if trimmed.contains(" ") → throw BadRequestException("SCAC Code must not contain spaces.")

  [Step 4] Check max length
           if trimmed.length() > 35 → throw BadRequestException("SCAC Code size must be between 0 and 35")

  [Step 5] Check alphanumeric
           regex: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$
           if !matches → throw BadRequestException("SCAC Code must be alphanumeric.")

  [Step 6] Convert to UPPERCASE
           scacCode = trimmed.toUpperCase()

  [Step 7] Uniqueness check
           NetworkParticipantService.checkIfScacCodeExists(scacCode)
           GET /network/reference/participants?scacCode={code}&includeInactive=false
           if participants list non-empty → throw BadRequestException("SCAC code is already taken")

  [Step 8] Role constraint (in register() / update())
           if companyRole NOT IN {Carrier_NVO, Carrier_VO} AND scacCode is not blank:
             → throw BadRequestException("SCAC code is not allowed for non-carrier roles.")
             (In update(): SCAC is silently cleared instead of throwing)
```

---

## 12. Background Async Processing

After the initial DynamoDB `save()` in `register()`, the HTTP response is returned immediately. Background work is submitted to a managed thread pool.

```
  RegistrationService.register()
           │
           │ [Sync] save() to DynamoDB
           │ [Sync] return savedRegistration to caller (HTTP 200)
           │
           └─► process(loggedInUser, savedRegistration)
                    │
                    ▼
          executorService.submit(Runnable)
          ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
          │  Named: "processor"                                              │
          │  Type: ThreadPoolExecutor (managed by Dropwizard lifecycle)      │
          │  Min threads: 15                                                 │
          │  Max threads: 30                                                 │
          │  Work queue: ArrayBlockingQueue(capacity=75)                     │
          │  Keep-alive: 0 seconds                                           │
          │  Shutdown timeout: 30 seconds                                    │
          │  Rejection policy: CallerRunsPolicy                              │
          │    (if queue full, the submitting thread runs the task inline)   │
          │                                                                  │
          │  Task: processRegistration(principal, persistedRegistration)     │
          │    Step 1: sendEmail(WLC)      → async fire-and-log             │
          │    Step 2: assignInttraCompanyId() → sync call to company svc   │
          │    Step 3: doComplianceCheck() → sync call to compliance svc    │
          │                                                                  │
          │  On any uncaught exception: logged at ERROR level, no re-throw  │
          └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Queue sizing rationale:** The code comment states: "Assume in worst case each record takes 10s to process, then within 30s it can process (30/10)*30 = 90 records. So choose any number smaller than 90 for the queue size should be safe to finish within 30s — here we choose 75."

**Important:** All three steps (`WLC` email, `assignInttraCompanyId`, `doComplianceCheck`) run sequentially within the submitted task. The `processRegistration` method is synchronous inside the thread. Only the submission itself is asynchronous from the HTTP request-response cycle.

---

## 13. Guice Dependency Injection Module Wiring

The Dropwizard `InttraServer` bootstrap creates and chains four Guice modules. Each module is constructed via a `moduleGenerator` lambda receiving `(RegistrationConfig, Environment)`.

```
  RegistrationApplication.main()
    InttraServer<RegistrationConfig>.builder()
      .configurationClass(RegistrationConfig.class)
      .command(DynamoDBCommand)
      .resources([RegistrationResource.class])
      .moduleGenerator(RegistrationDynamoModule::new)      [1]
      .moduleGenerator((c, e) -> new ServiceDefinitionModule(c))  [2]
      .moduleGenerator(ApplicationModule::new)             [3]
      .moduleGenerator(RegistrationEmailSenderModule::new)  [4]
      .build()


  Module [1]: RegistrationDynamoModule
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Input bindings: (RegistrationConfig config, Environment environment)
  Provides:
    bind(RegistrationConfig)        → config instance
    bind(DynamoRepositoryConfig)    → {domainType=RegistrationDetail, unpaginatedScan=true}
    @Provides @Singleton
    DynamoDbClientConfig            ← RegistrationConfig
                                      region from config or DefaultAwsRegionProviderChain
                                      credentialsProvider = DefaultCredentialsProvider
                                      tablePrefix = "{env}_"
                                      readCapacityUnits, writeCapacityUnits
                                      optional endpointOverride
    @Provides @Singleton
    EnhancedDynamoRepository        ← DynamoDbClientConfig + DynamoRepositoryConfig
                                      tableName = tablePrefix + "RegistrationDetail"
    @Provides @Singleton
    DatabaseRepository              ← EnhancedDynamoRepository (upcast)
    @Provides @Singleton
    RegistrationDao                 ← DatabaseRepository


  Module [2]: ServiceDefinitionModule
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Input: RegistrationConfig (only)
  For each ServiceDefinition in registrationConfig.getServiceDefinitions():
    bind(ServiceDefinition).annotatedWith(@Named(sd.getName())) → sd instance

  Named bindings created (from config.yaml):
    @Named("auth")                  → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../auth}
    @Named("network-participants")  → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../reference/participants}
    @Named("company")               → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../company}
    @Named("np-compliance-screening")→ ServiceDefinition{uri=.../participant/compliance}
    @Named("user")                  → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../user/create}
    @Named("ui-configuration")      → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../ui-configuration}
    @Named("blacklist")             → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../blacklist-email/find}
    @Named("domain-whitelist")      → ServiceDefinition{uri=.../participant/domainwhitelist}


  Module [3]: ApplicationModule
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Input: (RegistrationConfig, Environment)
  Registers with Jersey:
    XSSInterceptor  (validates POST/PUT request body)
    XSSFilter       (validates headers + query parameters)
  Provides:
    ArrayBlockingQueue(75) @Named("processor")
    ExecutorService @Named("processor")
      → environment.lifecycle().executorService("processor")
           .minThreads(15).maxThreads(30)
           .keepAliveTime(Duration.seconds(0))
           .workQueue(outboundWorkQueue)
           .shutdownTime(Duration.seconds(30))
           .rejectedExecutionHandler(CallerRunsPolicy)
    bind(RegistrationEmailConfig) → registrationConfig.getEmailSenderConfig()


  Module [4]: RegistrationEmailSenderModule
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Input: (RegistrationConfig, Environment)
  @Provides @Singleton
  EmailService → EmailClientFactory.createDefaultSesClient([
      "WelcomeEmailTemplate.json",
      "OnHoldEmailTemplate.json",
      "ApprovedEmailTemplate.json",
      "Declined_Duplicate_AccountEmailTemplate.json",
      "Declined_No_ResponseEmailTemplate.json",
      "Declined_UserAddedEmailTemplate.json"
    ])


  Injection chain for RegistrationService:
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  RegistrationService(@Named("processor") ExecutorService,
                      CompanyService,
                      CompanyComplianceService,
                      RegistrationDetailService,
                      EmailSender,
                      UserService,
                      BlackListService,
                      DomainWhitelistService,
                      UIConfigurationService,
                      NetworkParticipantService)

  RegistrationDetailService(RegistrationDao)

  EmailSender(EmailService, RegistrationConfig, UIConfigurationService)

  CompanyService(@Named("company") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  CompanyComplianceService(@Named("np-compliance-screening") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  UserService(@Named("user") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  BlackListService(@Named("blacklist") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  DomainWhitelistService(@Named("domain-whitelist") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  NetworkParticipantService(@Named("network-participants") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
  UIConfigurationService(@Named("ui-configuration") ServiceDefinition, ServiceClient)
```

---

## 14. REST API Summary

**Base Path:** `/registration` (configured via `rootPath` in `config.yaml`)
**Content-Type:** `application/json` (both consumed and produced)
**Authentication:** Bearer token (OAuth 2.0) validated against `securityResources.oauthTokenValidationUri`
**Authorization:** Routes marked `@RolesAllowed({"REGISTRATION_ADMIN"})` require the calling principal to hold the `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` role

| Method | Path | Auth Required | Role Required | Description | Key Query Params |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `POST` | `/register` | Yes (any authed user) | None | Submit a new company registration | — |
| `POST` | `/assign` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Assign an admin user to a registration | — |
| `GET` | `/{registrationId}` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Fetch a single registration by ID | — |
| `GET` | `/fetch/{registrationfetchtype}` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | List registrations. Types: `ALL`, `OPEN`, `ASSIGNED`, `UNASSIGNED`, `TERMINAL` | — |
| `POST` | `/process/assigninttracompanyId` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Manually trigger InttraCompanyId generation | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `POST` | `/process/docompliance` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Manually (re-)trigger OFAC compliance check | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `POST` | `/process/approve` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Approve registration (full pipeline) | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `POST` | `/process/update` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Update registration data; optionally re-trigger OFAC | `triggerofac` (boolean) |
| `POST` | `/process/decline/{emailType}` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Decline registration with specific email type (`DNR`/`DDA`/`DUA`) | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `POST` | `/process/onhold` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Place registration on hold + send ONH email | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `POST` | `/process/sendemail/{emailType}` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Resend any email type without state change | `registrationId`, `versionNumber` |
| `GET` | `/export` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Export all registrations (scan with projection) | — |
| `DELETE` | `/delete/{registrationId}` | Yes | `REGISTRATION_ADMIN` | Delete a registration by ID | — |

### Optimistic Locking

Every mutating admin operation (except `/register`) requires a `versionNumber` parameter. This value must match the current `version` attribute in DynamoDB. If it does not match:
- `RegistrationDetailService` throws `VersionMismatchException`
- The client must re-fetch the registration to get the current version before retrying

### Metrics

All endpoints are annotated with `@Timed` (Dropwizard Metrics). Metrics are reported every 30 seconds to the Observability platform (`observability.e2open.com`).

---

## 15. Configuration Properties Reference

The configuration file is `config.yaml`, environment-specific versions are in `conf/{env}/config.yaml`.

### Server Configuration

| Property | Example Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `server.rootPath` | `/registration` | All REST endpoints are served under this path |
| `server.applicationConnectors[0].port` | `8080` | HTTP application port |
| `server.adminConnectors[0].port` | `8081` | Dropwizard admin port (health, metrics, tasks) |

### Security

| Property | Example Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `securityResources.oauthTokenValidationUri` | `https://api.inttra.com/auth/validate` | OAuth token validation endpoint |
| `securityResources.userInfoUri` | `https://api.inttra.com/auth/validate-user` | User info lookup |
| `securityResources.userPrincipalUri` | `https://api.inttra.com/auth/principal` | Principal extraction endpoint |

### Jersey Client (Outbound HTTP)

| Property | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `jerseyClient.minThreads` | `32` | Minimum HTTP client threads |
| `jerseyClient.maxThreads` | `128` | Maximum HTTP client threads |
| `jerseyClient.workQueueSize` | `8` | Client work queue |
| `jerseyClient.timeout` | `15s` | Request/response timeout |
| `jerseyClient.retries` | `2` | Retry count on failure |
| `jerseyClient.gzipEnabled` | `true` | GZIP compression on responses |

### DynamoDB

| Property | Example (int) | Example (prod) | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `dynamoDbConfig.environment` | `inttra_int_registration` | `inttra2_prod_registration` | Table prefix (prefixed to `_RegistrationDetail`) |
| `dynamoDbConfig.readCapacityUnits` | `10` | `10` | DynamoDB read capacity |
| `dynamoDbConfig.writeCapacityUnits` | `10` | `10` | DynamoDB write capacity |
| `dynamoDbConfig.region` | (default: us-east-1) | (default: us-east-1) | AWS region override |
| `dynamoDbConfig.endpointOverride` | (not set) | (not set) | For local DynamoDB testing |

### Email

| Property | Example (int) | Example (prod) | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `emailSenderConfig.sourceEmail` | `INTTRA Registration <no-reply@registration-alpha.inttra.com>` | `INTTRA Registration <no-reply@registration.inttra.com>` | SES From address |
| `emailSenderConfig.internalEmails` | — | — | Optional internal distribution list |

### Environment (Portal URLs)

| Property | Example (int) | Example (prod) | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `environmentConfig.shipmentPortalURL` | `https://alpha.inttra.e2open.com` | `https://ship.inttra.e2open.com` | URL injected into APR email |
| `environmentConfig.myAdminPortalURL` | `https://myadmin-alpha.inttra.e2open.com` | `https://myadmin.inttra.e2open.com` | Legacy admin portal URL |
| `environmentConfig.myAdminHarmonizedPortalURL` | `https://my-admin-alpha.inttra.e2open.com` | `https://my-admin.inttra.e2open.com` | New harmonized admin portal URL |

### Service Definitions (Network Service URIs)

| Named Binding | INT URI | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `auth` | `https://api-alpha.inttra.com/auth` | OAuth / authentication service |
| `network-participants` | `.../network/reference/participants` | SCAC code uniqueness lookup |
| `company` | `.../network/company` | Company provisioning service |
| `np-compliance-screening` | `.../network/participant/compliance` | OFAC / RPS screening service |
| `user` | `.../network/user/create` | User account creation service |
| `ui-configuration` | `.../network/ui-configuration` | Feature flag service (e2ProxyEnabled, carrierConnectionsV2Enabled) |
| `blacklist` | `.../network/blacklist-email/find` | Email blacklist check service |
| `domain-whitelist` | `.../network/participant/domainwhitelist` | Email domain whitelisting service |

Secrets (`clientId`, `clientSecret` for the `auth` service) are resolved from AWS Parameter Store using the `${awsps:/path/to/key}` syntax at runtime.

### Metrics Reporting

| Property | Value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `metrics.frequency` | `30 second` | Reporting interval |
| `metrics.reporters[0].type` | `observability-metrics` | Reporter type (e2open observability) |
| `metrics.reporters[0].url` | `https://observability.e2open.com/webhook` | Webhook endpoint |
| `metrics.reporters[0].environment` | `int` / `prod` | Environment tag |
| `metrics.reporters[0].component` | `registration` | Component tag |

---

*End of document.*
